creator: xxjack12xx@gmail.com
text:
===>  Building for php5-mysqli-5.2.3
/bin/sh /usr/ports/databases/php5-mysqli/work/php-5.2.3/ext/mysqli/libtool
--mode=compile cc  -I.
-I/usr/ports/databases/php5-mysqli/work/php-5.2.3/ext/mysqli -DPHP_ATOM_INC
-I/usr/ports/databases/php5-mysqli/work/php-5.2.3/ext/mysqli/include
-I/usr/ports/databases/php5-mysqli/work/php-5.2.3/ext/mysqli/main
-I/usr/ports/databases/php5-mysqli/work/php-5.2.3/ext/mysqli
-I/usr/local/include/php
-I/usr/local/include/php/main -I/usr/local/include/php/TSRM
-I/usr/local/include/php/Zend
-I/usr/local/include/php/ext -I/usr/local/include/php/ext/date/lib
-I/usr/local/include/mysql
-DHAVE_CONFIG_H  -O2 -fno-strict-aliasing -pipe -march=opteron   -c
/usr/ports/databases/php5-mysqli/work/php-5.2.3/ext/mysqli/mysqli_api.c
-o mysqli_api.lo
 cc -I. -I/usr/ports/databases/php5-mysqli/work/php-5.2.3/ext/mysqli
-DPHP_ATOM_INC
-I/usr/ports/databases/php5-mysqli/work/php-5.2.3/ext/mysqli/include
-I/usr/ports/databases/php5-mysqli/work/php-5.2.3/ext/mysqli/main
-I/usr/ports/databases/php5-mysqli/work/php-5.2.3/ext/mysqli
-I/usr/local/include/php
-I/usr/local/include/php/main -I/usr/local/include/php/TSRM
-I/usr/local/include/php/Zend
-I/usr/local/include/php/ext -I/usr/local/include/php/ext/date/lib
-I/usr/local/include/mysql
-DHAVE_CONFIG_H -O2 -fno-strict-aliasing -pipe -march=opteron -c
/usr/ports/databases/php5-mysqli/work/php-5.2.3/ext/mysqli/mysqli_api.c
 -fPIC -DPIC -o
.libs/mysqli_api.o
/usr/ports/databases/php5-mysqli/work/php-5.2.3/ext/mysqli/mysqli_api.c:
In function
`zif_mysqli_stmt_bind_param':
/usr/ports/databases/php5-mysqli/work/php-5.2.3/ext/mysqli/mysqli_api.c:144:
error: `gptr' undeclared
(first use in this function)
/usr/ports/databases/php5-mysqli/work/php-5.2.3/ext/mysqli/mysqli_api.c:144:
error: (Each undeclared
identifier is reported only once
/usr/ports/databases/php5-mysqli/work/php-5.2.3/ext/mysqli/mysqli_api.c:144:
error: for each function
it appears in.)
/usr/ports/databases/php5-mysqli/work/php-5.2.3/ext/mysqli/mysqli_api.c:
In function
`zif_mysqli_stmt_execute':
/usr/ports/databases/php5-mysqli/work/php-5.2.3/ext/mysqli/mysqli_api.c:603:
error: `gptr' undeclared
(first use in this function)
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/databases/php5-mysqli/work/php-5.2.3/ext/mysqli.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/databases/php5-mysqli.

Fix: 

It works with older versions of the mysql51-server / client port.
How-To-Repeat: Upgrade the mysql51-server / client port to 5.1.20 and compile the
php5-mysqli port. It does not
compile.
